title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, April 09 2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 09/04/2024
Image reference: 2024-04-09_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-april-09-2024_img1.png
Bulkers : Modern Supramax tonnage softened last week, whilst older Handy BCs firmed due to recent deals
Handy BC Atlantic Prism (38,200 DWT, May 2019, Shin Kurushima Toyohashi) sold to Unknown European for USD 28.50 mil (SS/DD Due), VV Value USD 27.42 mil
Handy BC Dragonera (35,700 DWT, Aug 2011, Daoda Marine HI) sold to unknown buyers for USD 14 mil (DD Passed), VV Value USD 12.86 mil
Handy BC Katya Atka (28,400 DWT, Sep 2009, Imbari) sold to unknown Vietnamese buyers for USD 9 mil (SS/DD Due), VV Value USD 11.05 mil
Tankers : Tanker values mostly stable, apart from a decrease in mid-age Aframaxes
Aframax Minerva Helen (103,600 DWT, Jan 2004, Samsung) sold to unknown Chinese for USD 30.35 mil, VV Value USD 30.05 mil
Containers : Secondhand values continued to show strength from higher earnings and firmed sales prices above recent averages
No notable sales
Image reference: 2024-04-09_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-april-09-2024_img2.jpg
